task: openclaw-benben shadow /gemma local fast lane rollout

changes.summary: Add /gemma local lane using huihui_ai/gemma-4-abliterated:e2b while keeping /lite and /local on qwen9b.
Document qwen9b quality lane and e2b fast lane status commands.
Append huihui_ai/gemma-4-abliterated:e2b to REMOTE_MODELS; keep qwen9b.
Merge process.env with runtime api.env during plugin registration so systemd OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND remains visible when api.env is empty.
Register a narrow reply_dispatch fallback for Feishu local-lane commands and add sanitized diagnostics for /lite, /local, and /gemma dispatch handling.
Cover the reply_dispatch fallback path for /gemma from finalized Feishu context.
Set vNext local lane timeouts to 120s for /lite qwen9b and 45s for /gemma e2b.

rollback.strategy: Restore backed-up files and relay unit, run systemctl daemon-reload, then restart openclaw-ollama-relay.service and openclaw-benben.service.

live_checks: systemctl is-active openclaw-ollama-relay.service openclaw-benben.service openclaw-gateway.service: active, active, active
relay /healthz remoteModels includes huihui_ai/gemma-4-abliterated:e2b and huihui_ai/qwen3.5-abliterated:9b
direct relay /api/chat e2b smoke returned OK_GEMMA
shadow plugin synthetic /gemma status and /gemma route returned e2b
shadow plugin default adapter /gemma smoke returned OK_PLUGIN_GEMMA
plugin.register with empty api.env and systemd-equivalent process env registers before_dispatch priority 90
openclaw-benben.service restarted at 2026-04-28 14:13:17 CST with PID 3465502
startup journal shows openclaw-benben-vnext registering Feishu local-lane hooks at priority 90
shadow synthetic dispatchReplyFromConfig /gemma returned Gemma fast-lane enable text
openclaw-benben.service restarted at 2026-04-28 15:31:57 CST with PID 3572296
synthetic /lite status reports timeout=120s and /gemma status reports timeout=45s
journalctl warnings for openclaw-benben.service and openclaw-ollama-relay.service since rollout: no entries
live_test_notes: Remote node --test for the synced plugin test file failed with EACCES spawning /usr/local/lib/node-v22.22.1-linux-x64/bin/node; local product-repo tests passed and live synthetic dispatch passed.
No new real Feishu /gemma inbound was observed during the 75s journal follow after the dispatch fallback rollout.

residual_risk: This verified shadow and synthetic/local paths only; no Feishu production cutover was performed.
Actual user-facing Feishu /gemma behavior still requires the user to send a new Feishu message and observe the live journal handling line.
